Compliance.description: Registered dealer (2015/116638/07); complies with FICA, CPA; past 2017 FIC penalty but 2025 AutoTrader awards show good track record.

Customer Satisfaction.description: #1 on HelloPeter 4.95/5 (1415 reviews, 96% 5 stars); AutoTrader 4.8/5 (1731); minor social complaints.

Product Value.description: Competitive used car pricing with full history guarantees; broad range; transparent online listings.

Innovation.description: Dealership app (iOS), online auction/finance platform, loan calculator.

Customer Support.description: HelloPeter 100% response, 0.55hr avg, 90 NPS; extended hours; positive feedback.

Accessibility & Security.description: App claims no data collection; FICA/POPIA compliant via PAIA; no breaches found.

pricing.name: Pricing
pricing.cost: Pricing: Used cars R130k-R650k (e.g. R240k Polo ~R5k/mo)

socialSentiment.summary: Strongly positive on review sites; some TikTok/FB negatives on defects.
